texto: To repeat some of the most basic facts: women still do not have the equal political power they have long sought, since only one in five MPs is a woman. They do not have economic equality, since the pay gap is still not only large but actually widening. They do not have the freedom from violence they have sought, and with the conviction rate in rape cases standing at just 6 percent, they know that rapists enjoy an effective impunity in our society.
explicacao: Citação de Natasha Walter sobre temas ligados a felicidade. “To repeat some of the most basic facts: women still do not have the equal political power they ha…” articula felicidade, feminism, feminist em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como feminist e sexism.
